visual_differentiation_axes: bright castaway expedition tone instead of military or neon combat framing
top survival ribbon plus fold-out notebook rail layout
rope, canvas, driftwood, and map-marker motif language
character-led icon featuring leader and beacon camp silhouette
storm warning cards and roster drawer as recurring screen motifs
forbidden_visual_reuse: top HUD pills with thick always-open bottom command strip
dark fortress or siege stone frame language
generic crate, sword, tower, or shield launcher icon

ui_identity.layout_archetype: shallow top survival ribbon with retractable bottom notebook rail and occasional floating alert cards
ui_identity.hud_composition: top-left colony vitals, top-right day and weather chips, bottom notebook tabs for build assign craft map objectives, lower corners reserved for movement and action controls
ui_identity.navigation_model: touch exploration in play, one-tap drawer overlays for colony management, lightweight roster screen for assignments
ui_identity.palette_signature: seafoam blue, sun-bleached canvas, driftwood tan, coral orange, and leaf green on bright neutral panels
ui_identity.material_language: stitched canvas panels, rope knots, washed wood headers, soft map tags, and clean rounded card edges
ui_identity.typography_style: friendly expedition signage with bold readable headers and simple clean body labels

reserved_edges: thin top edge for vitals and weather
bottom edge for retractable notebook rail
protected_gameplay_zones: resource node interaction ring around player
hazard reaction space near animals and structures
playfield_safety.frame_overlay_policy: Decorative ropes, canvas seams, and driftwood trims may appear only inside HUD containers and must never overlay the live island terrain.

unique_screen_motifs: beacon progress meter with flame marker
forbidden_ui_elements: grim rusted hazard tape as the primary identity

icon_identity.subject: castaway leader with raised torch or hammer in front of a half-built beach camp
icon_identity.silhouette: large foreground survivor figure with raised arm, triangular tent, and angled beacon flame behind
icon_identity.composition: close-up hero in lower center with beacon glow offset behind the shoulder and camp silhouette along the base
icon_identity.palette: warm sand beige, ocean blue, sunset orange, and leafy green accents
icon_identity.background: soft sky-to-sea gradient with beacon light bloom
icon_identity.game_specific_motif: beacon camp flame and rescue-built shelter
forbidden_icon_reuse: reused fortress, truck, or neon emblem compositions
